name: Masoud Pezeshkian
summary: Day 78. Pezeshkian 'we will never bow / negotiation does not mean surrender' continues as one of five institutional pillars in Iran's refined multi-track posture (alongside FM Araghchi defer-enrichment, Khamenei-advisor Shamkhani conditional-acceptance on sanctions removal, Artesh-Akraminia 'surprising options', IRGC-drill 'all objectives achieved'). **A11 Mojtaba Khamenei DAY 9 OF STATE-MEDIA SILENCE** — May 13 a portrait of Mojtaba was carried at the national football team's farewell ceremony ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup; a portrait, NOT the Supreme Leader himself. The CNN April 21 framing 'Iran's new supreme leader is nowhere to be seen — that might be helping the regime to survive' continues to hold structurally. The IRGC drill's invocation of late Ali Khamenei rather than supposedly-active Mojtaba remains the institutional tell. **The May 7 Pezeshkian-Mojtaba meeting claim is now Day 9 without state-media corroboration** — meeting status unchanged (CLAIMED, unverifiable). Iranian officials denied receiving Trump's May 16 nuclear ultimatum letter — Pezeshkian-led civilian government on the public-rejection track even as Khamenei-advisor Shamkhani publicly offered conditional acceptance. PRIOR (May 14): Pezeshkian 'we will never bow / negotiation does not mean surrender' continues across IRNA — multi-channel state-media synchronisation pattern. No fresh public statement specific to Pezeshkian today. The IRGC's 'Martyred Commander' / 'Labbayk Ya Khamenei' 5-day exercise (A12) named for the LATE Ali Khamenei rather than Mojtaba reinforces Pezeshkian's structural position: civilian government on negotiating track exists in parallel to IRGC kinetic-preparedness track, with neither institutional voice acting as unified executive. The May 7 Pezeshkian-Mojtaba meeting claim is now Day 7 without state-media corroboration — meeting status unchanged (CLAIMED, unverifiable). PRIOR (May 10): **PEZESHKIAN MAY 8 CLAIM OF 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING WITH MOJTABA — STILL NO IRANIAN STATE MEDIA CORROBORATION 48 HOURS LATER (no video/audio/photo). The silence is the new signal — narrative-management gap WIDENING, not narrowing.** Speaking at meeting with trade-union and market representatives broadcast on Iranian state TV, Pezeshkian said May 7-8 that he met Mojtaba 'completely unmediated' for two and a half hours but provided NO date, NO location, NO list of other participants, and NO substantive readout (CONFIRMED that statement was made — Times of Israel, Euronews, Al Jazeera, Pakistani Jang, Shafaqna Pakistan; the underlying MEETING is CLAIMED — single-side, no independent verification, no video/audio/photo, no third-party attestation). Same day Al Jazeera ran 'Pezeshkian seeks to quash divided leadership narrative' framing the claim as direct narrative management against Pezeshkian-vs-IRGC factional-divergence reporting. CNN/KVIA same day carried US intel assessment that Mojtaba is 'out of public view but still shaping strategy.' The Pezeshkian claim and US-intel 'out of public view' line operate against each other in the public information space. **Read as intelligence:** Pezeshkian's claim reads as credibility-borrowing move INSIDE the negotiation as much as a domestic-narrative move; the IRGC-vs-civilian-government factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers (May 7) and Mokhber-adviser delivered the 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine. The Stage 2 playbook (named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without evidence) replaces the prior Stage 1 (written-only statements via state TV). PRIOR FRAMING (preserved as intelligence-context): Reuters/Fox wire-tier 'IRGC blocks president' framing: Vahidi-IRGC inner circle dominates decision-making; Pezeshkian's Apr 11 'collapse within 3 weeks to 1 month' rial warning was vindicated on Apr 29 (rial 1.8M Apr 29; rial 1,812,000 IRR/USD remittance May 8 confirms continued depreciation). Pezeshkian's Sunday electricity-rationing call holds as the operational acknowledgement that US blockade is biting at consumer-utility level.

active_triggers.condition: Pezeshkian resigns, is removed, or publicly denounces the IRGC power grab
Pezeshkian's 'total collapse within three weeks to one month' economic warning proves correct (early-May deadline)
Pezeshkian publicly meets or is photographed with Mojtaba Khamenei
Pezeshkian publicly forces Vahidi out OR Vahidi forces Pezeshkian out within Trump's 3-5 day window (~April 26 IST)

recent_signals.headline: PEZESHKIAN-MOJTABA 2.5-HOUR MEETING CLAIM ENTERS 48-HOUR MARK WITHOUT STATE-MEDIA CORROBORATION — NO VIDEO/AUDIO/PHOTO/SECOND SOURCE/DATE/LOCATION/PARTICIPANTS. Information vacuum WIDENING. Read as institutional intelligence: if credible meeting had occurred, regime would by now have produced visual evidence for domestic legitimacy — particularly during a week when supreme leader's authority over potential MOU is the central question. The continued vacuum reinforces Stage 2 managed-leadership-vacuum playbook (named senior officials publicly attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without producing evidence). The IRGC-civilian factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers (May 7) and Mokhber-adviser delivered the 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine.
sources: Searched all major Iranian state outlets (IRNA, Tasnim, Press TV, Mehr, ISNA) — CONFIRMED ABSENCE of corroboration
CNN/KVIA (US intel assessment unchanged — Mojtaba 'shaping strategy out of public view')
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED ABSENCE of state-media corroboration in 48 hours since claim; the silence is the verified signal

recent_signals.headline: PEZESHKIAN PUBLIC CLAIM OF 2.5-HOUR FACE-TO-FACE MEETING WITH MOJTABA — FIRST SUCH SENIOR-OFFICIAL CLAIM SINCE MOJTABA'S APPOINTMENT 60+ DAYS AGO. Pezeshkian on Iranian state TV said he met Mojtaba 'completely unmediated' for 2.5 hours; provided NO date, NO location, NO participants, NO substantive readout, NO visual evidence. Al Jazeera same day: 'Pezeshkian seeks to quash divided leadership narrative' — framing the claim as direct narrative management against the Pezeshkian-IRGC factional-divergence reporting. CNN/KVIA same day: US intel community formally assesses Mojtaba is alive 'shaping strategy' but injured and 'out of public view' — directly contradicts Pezeshkian's claim. Reads as Stage 2 narrative-management playbook (named senior officials attesting to private contact with the supreme leader without evidence). Pezeshkian's claim is a credibility-borrowing move inside the MOU negotiation as much as a domestic-narrative move; the IRGC-civilian factional split is not closed by an unverifiable face-to-face claim, particularly one made in the same week IRGC publicly attacked three US destroyers and Mokhber delivered the 'atomic-bomb' Hormuz doctrine. Mokhber framed in some Iranian/Pakistani outlets as adviser specifically to Mojtaba — the only Khamenei-adjacent voice publicly speaking in cycle.
recent_signals.verification: Pezeshkian STATEMENT = CONFIRMED multi-source primary; the actual MEETING = CLAIMED single-side, no independent verification, no date/location/witnesses/visual; US intel assessment = REPORTED (CNN/KVIA citing US intel community)

recent_signals.headline: DAY 60 MONDAY — PEZESHKIAN'S HEAD-OF-STATE PRECONDITION HOLDS POST TRUMP-WINDOW EXPIRY
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED window expiry + Leavitt remarks + Putin-

historical_summaries.summary: 17 signals. 'NECESSARY WILL' SIGNAL TO EU | OPEN LETTER TO AMERICAN PEOPLE | DEADLINE-DAY SILENCE
